name: claude-notifications
description: Smart desktop notifications for Claude Code — task complete, questions, plan ready, sounds, click-to-focus.

methods.name: bootstrap
methods.command: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/777genius/claude-notifications-go/main/bin/bootstrap.sh | bash || { echo 'Bootstrap had issues, attempting manual install...' && claude plugin marketplace add 777genius/claude-notifications-go </dev/null 2>/dev/null; claude plugin install claude-notifications-go@claude-notifications-go </dev/null 2>/dev/null && PLUGIN_ROOT=$(node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.HOME+'/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json','utf8'));const e=((d.plugins||{})['claude-notifications-go@claude-notifications-go']||[]).filter(x=>x.installPath);if(e.length)process.stdout.write(e[e.length-1].installPath)" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] && INSTALL_TARGET_DIR="$PLUGIN_ROOT/bin" bash "$PLUGIN_ROOT/bin/install.sh"; }

post_install_hints: Restart Claude Code for notification hooks to take effect
Run /claude-notifications-go:settings inside Claude Code to configure sounds and webhooks
